project_summary.estimator_summary: Secure analysis extracted 60 opening(s) and 0 hardware set(s). Verify against source PDF before bidding.

general_notes:
A. ALL EXTERIOR HOLLOW METAL FRAMES SHALL BE FILLED WITH 
INSULATION.

B. ALL INTERIOR HOLLOW METAL FRAMES SET IN MASONRY AND 
CONCRETE WALLS SHALL BE GROUTED SOLID.

C. ALL HOLLOW METAL FRAMES SET IN METAL STUD WALLS 
SHALL BE FILLED WITH MINERAL WOOL BLANKET INSULATION.

D. ALL EXTERIOR FRAMES SHALL BE INSTALLED WITH 1/4" SHIM 
AND SEALANT AROUND PERIMETER OF FRAME.

E. MASONRY LINTELS AND STEEL LINTELS ARE SHOWN ON 
STRUCTURAL DRAWINGS.

F. GLASS TYPES FOR DOORS ARE INDICATED IN THE DOOR 
GLAZING COLUMN OF THE DOOR AND FRAME SCHEDULE.  
GLASS TYPES FOR FRAMES ARE INDICATED ON THE FRAME 
ELEVATIONS.

G. FOR COILING DOORS, GRILLES AND SECTIONAL DOORS, WIDTH 
AND HEIGHT DIMENSIONS SHOWN IN DOOR AND FRAME 
SCHEDULE REPRESENT FINISHED OPENING SIZE.  
CONTRACTOR TO COORDINATE EXACT SIZE OF  DOOR WITH 
MANUFACTURER.

H. FRAME MANUFACTURER SHALL COORDINATE LOCATIONS OF 
ALL CONCEALED CONDUIT AND J-BOXES REQUIRED FOR 
SECURITY SYSTEM HARDWARE PRIOR TO MANUFACTURING OF 
HOLLOW METAL FRAMES AND COORDINATE WITH SECURITY 
HARDWARE AND DEVICES.

I. 
PROVIDE HEAD RECEIVERS AT ALUMINUM STOREFRONTS AND 
CURTAIN WALLS AS REQUIRED FOR STRUCTURAL DEFLECTION 
ALLOWANCE.

J. SEE SPECIFICATIONS HARDWARE SECTION FOR HARDWARE 
SETS NOTED IN DOOR AND FRAME SCHEDULE.
hardware_preamble:
H. FRAME MANUFACTURER SHALL COORDINATE LOCATIONS OF
ALL CONCEALED CONDUIT AND J-BOXES REQUIRED FOR 
SECURITY SYSTEM HARDWARE PRIOR TO MANUFACTURING OF 
HOLLOW METAL FRAMES AND COORDINATE WITH SECURITY 
HARDWARE AND DEVICES.

J. SEE SPECIFICATIONS HARDWARE SECTION FOR HARDWARE
SETS NOTED IN DOOR AND FRAME SCHEDULE.

project_risks.issue: 60 opening(s) have no hardware set assigned in the schedule.
project_risks.recommendation: Issue RFI to confirm hardware set assignments before bidding.

project_risks.issue: 3 fire-rated opening(s) require coordinated UL-listed door, frame and hardware assemblies.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm labels, positive latching, closers and gasketing requirements.

rfi_log.question: The door schedule does not show a hardware set for: A1S1, A100A, A100B, A102A, A102B, A103, A104, A105, ...+48 more. Please confirm the intended hardware set for each.
Please provide the complete keying schedule, keyway, cylinder format, construction core requirement and key counts.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.
rfi_log.reason: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.

estimator_notes: 60 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
10 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
2 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for fire-rated assembly coordination, S-label gasketing and any UL field-modification charges.
Allowance for construction cylinders and final keying meeting attendance.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
